= RFD 9999 Mermaid Diagram Test Fixture
:state: published

== Wide Flowchart

[source,mermaid]
----
flowchart LR
    A[Start] --> B[Step 1]
    B --> C[Step 2]
    C --> D[Step 3]
    D --> E[Step 4]
    E --> F[Step 5]
    F --> G[Step 6]
    G --> H[Step 7]
    H --> I[Step 8]
    I --> J[End]
----

== Tall Sequence Diagram

[source,mermaid]
----
sequenceDiagram
    participant A as Client
    participant B as API Gateway
    participant C as Auth Service
    participant D as Database
    A->>B: Request
    B->>C: Validate token
    C->>D: Lookup user
    D-->>C: User data
    C-->>B: Token valid
    B->>D: Query data
    D-->>B: Results
    B-->>A: Response
    A->>B: Second request
    B->>C: Revalidate
    C-->>B: OK
    B->>D: Update record
    D-->>B: Confirmed
    B-->>A: Success
    A->>B: Third request
    B->>D: Delete record
    D-->>B: Deleted
    B-->>A: Done
----

== Small State Diagram

[source,mermaid]
----
stateDiagram-v2
    [*] --> Idle
    Idle --> Running
    Running --> Done
    Done --> [*]
----

== Large State Diagram

[source,mermaid]
----
stateDiagram-v2
    [*] --> Planning
    Planning --> Design
    Design --> Review
    Review --> Planning : Rejected
    Review --> Implementation
    Implementation --> Testing
    Testing --> Implementation : Bug found
    Testing --> Staging
    Staging --> Testing : Regression
    Staging --> Production
    Production --> Monitoring
    Monitoring --> Planning : New requirements
    Monitoring --> Incident
    Incident --> Rollback
    Rollback --> Staging
    Incident --> Hotfix
    Hotfix --> Testing
    Production --> [*]
----

== Gantt Chart

[source,mermaid]
----
gantt
    title Project Timeline
    dateFormat  YYYY-MM-DD
    section Planning
    Requirements         :a1, 2024-01-01, 14d
    Architecture Design  :a2, after a1, 21d
    section Development
    Sprint 1             :b1, after a2, 14d
    Sprint 2             :b2, after b1, 14d
    Sprint 3             :b3, after b2, 14d
    Sprint 4             :b4, after b3, 14d
    section Testing
    Integration Tests    :c1, after b3, 14d
    Performance Tests    :c2, after b4, 14d
    section Release
    Staging Deploy       :d1, after c2, 7d
    Production Deploy    :d2, after d1, 3d
----
